title: carex muricata var. nemorosa
intro: Carex muricata var. nemorosa, also known as the woodland-hare's-tail or woodland sedge, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the sedge family (Cyperaceae). This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional herbal medicine, where it is used to treat a variety of health issues, including fever, coughs, and respiratory problems. The health benefits of Carex muricata var. nemorosa include its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which can help to soothe sore throats and reduce inflammation. Carex muricata var. nemorosa can be prepared as an infusion or decoction, and it is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
